_comment: Portable slice of ~/.claude/settings.json. install.sh MERGES these keys into the live file (creating it if absent) and leaves every other key alone. Keys starting with _ are stripped, not merged. Deliberately excluded: enabledPlugins + extraKnownMarketplaces (scripts/install-plugins.sh owns those, from plugins.yaml) and skipDangerousModePermissionPrompt (per-machine consent, not config).
_comment_statusline: $HOME, never /root — the same file is read by claude on the macOS host AND inside the container, where $HOME is /root. A hardcoded /root path renders nothing on the host. gsd-statusline.js needs compiled libs that install-claude-config.sh builds; without that build it throws Cannot find module and the whole chain renders empty.
